name: Three Step Turn
preceding_figure_names: Closed Rocks, Natural Basic Movement, Open Rocks, Promenade And Counter Promenade Runs, Reverse Basic Movement, Side Basic Movement
notes:
Note: when preceded by Closed Rock, Man is already holding lady's R hand in his L hand.
Options for turns: either continuous turn/pivot (3 half turns), or do spiral on 1 and 3.
Note the difference in timing for Lady. No bounce.
Finish the R side: squeeze/compress R side, before pushing off RF to step LF fwd for next step.
Option: body turned, but keep head looking at partner, push connection with Man before turning head in next Samba Locks.

comments: Note: when preceded by Closed Rock, Man is already holding lady's R hand in his L hand.

steps.action: Take minimal weight to RF, draw LF back
comments: Continue to turn Lady strongly to L on step 2 and 3, lowering L arm at the end of her turn.

steps.action: RF to side turning 1/4 L, then continue to turn 3/8 on RF (Spiral action)
comments: Finish the R side: squeeze/compress R side, before pushing off RF to step LF fwd for next step.
Option: body turned, but keep head looking at partner, push connection with Man before turning head in next Samba Locks.

steps.action: RF to side turning L, then continue to turn 5/8 L on RF
comments: Note the difference in timing for Lady. No bounce.
Options for turns: either continuous turn/pivot (3 half turns), or do spiral on 1 and 3.

steps.action: LF fwd continuing to turn L
RF to side turning 1/4 L, then continue to turn 3/8 on RF (Spiral action)
comments: Finish the R side: squeeze/compress R side, before pushing off RF to step LF fwd for next step.
Option: body turned, but keep head looking at partner, push connection with Man before turning head in next Samba Locks.
